notes: Multi-agent Code: Juno can now split big requests across up to four focused helper agents that run in parallel — investigators, builders, reviewers and testers, each with its own isolated context, permissions and live activity card. Writing agents work in isolated Git worktrees and their changes arrive as reviewable diffs; you approve every risky action from one central prompt. Plus a new Agents control in the composer (Off / Ask / Auto), per-agent usage accounting, and the corrected thinking-effort ladder for the latest models.
